channel.title: UK on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in UK on Alien Truth Social

item.title: British UFO Research Association
item.description:
The British UFO Research Association (BUFORA) is a UK organization dedicated to investigating UFO phenomena in the British Isles. Founded in 1964, it reportedly had around 1,000 members in 1997 and investigates over 400 cases annually, with 95% identified as hoaxes. BUFORA has held annual conferences since 1987 and supports witnesses who believe they have encountered extraterrestrials. The organization has also been critical of the UK government’s handling of UFO-related information under the Freedom of Information Act.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/British_UFO_Research_Association

item.title: Megatron: The UFO-Shaped Restaurant
item.description:
The Megatron was a flying saucer-designed building in Cambridgeshire, UK, constructed in 1990 as a restaurant. It was conceived by local businessman Danny Blundell and designed by Graham Campbell, featuring innovations like touchscreen ordering. Upon opening, locals mistook it for a UFO, prompting police investigation. The restaurant closed in 1992 due to high costs and was later taken over by McDonald’s, before ultimately being demolished in 2008.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Megatron_%28building%29
